metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4200
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Immunostaining with PAN-MALS antibodies reveals partial colocaliziation with the presynaptic marker liprin-alpha-2 (Fig. 1D) and synaptophysin (Fig. 1E) and the postsynaptic marker PSD-95 (Fig. S2). MALS-3 is enriched in PSD fractions from rat brain (Fig. 1 C). Close inspection of Fig. S2 suggests a higher degree of colocalization with PSD-95 than with the presynaptic marker liprin-alpha-2.

28/01/2021 Dnyanada:
- The term "synapse" was chosen as the paper shows colocalisation of MALS with both pre and postsynaptic markers.
- Pan-MALS antibody used in this study does not distinguish between the different MALS isoforms as seen in Figure 4D, PMID:11104771.. Experimental description: Fig. 1 deals with mouse and rat material, but it is unclear, which species was used for Fig 1D,E and Fig. S2.
